scripts.copy-duckdb: shx mkdir -p BlazorHost/wwwroot/js/duckdb && shx cp node_modules/@duckdb/duckdb-wasm/dist/duckdb-mvp.wasm node_modules/@duckdb/duckdb-wasm/dist/duckdb-eh.wasm node_modules/@duckdb/duckdb-wasm/dist/duckdb-browser-mvp.worker.js node_modules/@duckdb/duckdb-wasm/dist/duckdb-browser-eh.worker.js node_modules/@duckdb/duckdb-wasm/dist/duckdb-browser.mjs BlazorHost/wwwroot/js/duckdb/
